titleStmt.title: SII 38.457: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 457. (A.R. No. 457 of 1912.) KŌṬṬŪR, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On detached slabs built into the main gōpura of the same temple.

summary.p: First line is built in. It seems to refer to the grant of quarter vēli of land, exempting taxes such as antarāyam, paṇḍaiveṭṭi and other taxes. The temple officials padipādamūlappaṭṭuḍai pañchācharya-dēvarkaṉmikaḷ are found mentioned. The temple accountant Kōṭṭūr-uḍaiyāṉ Dēvaṉ Kauśikan figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātuviḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷvaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇaraurimaiyil ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi miṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara vikkalan ciṅkaṇan melkaṭalpāya tikkaṉaittum tancakkaram naṭātti viraciṅkācaṉattu puvaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiṉa korājakecaripanmaThere is a curve over the letter ma� which may be iṅnored.rāna cakkaravarttikaḷ śrī kolottuṅkacoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6 Āvatu nāṅkaḷ viṭṭa nilam kālukkum Antarāyamum muṉṉam paṇṭaiveṭṭiyum tiruviḷaiya
patipātamulappaṭṭuṭai pañcācāriya devarkaṉmikaḷom Ippaṭi Aḻivu cetom tiruvāṇai puvanimuḻutuṭaiyār Āṇaiye Ivarkaḷukkāka camaittu Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutineṉ Ikkoyiṟkaṇakku koṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ tevaṉkaucikan ti neṉ Ivai Enneḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.457 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
